understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each KA59 level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' in the semantic grid was occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, within the per-level step budget, progressing through all levels until the run reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) when not blocked by boundaries/objects; if a pushable object was adjacent in the move direction, the move could push it along. Walls/boundaries could prevent movement, and the movement_*_blocked flags were only hints (adjacency), not guarantees. Levels could have multiple selectables, and control was switched by CLICKing the exact pixel/grid coordinate of another selectable in the objects list; clicking a position without a different selectable there would not change the selected piece.
